versions.command: F:\WorkDir\locma\.venv\Scripts\locma depot publish e28c runs/e28c_s0.zip runs/e28c_s1.zip runs/e28c_s2.zip --kind model --note E28c token-fx obs - reactive recipe of record. Pointer head retrained at the exact e28p recipe with obs_mode=token-fx: 3 play-effect columns (player_hp/enemy_hp/card_draw) for hand cards, encode.py variant 'fx', TOKEN_FEATS_FX=20. Feature completion only - the obs is the single changed variable. First lever to move item behavior (rate/opportunity 0.142 -> 0.19-0.23). Trained via 'locma train-zoo --pointer-head --obs-mode token-fx', seeds 0/1/2. --meta {"avg_hard3_reactive_pair": 0.8784, "avg_hard3_lens_stack": 0.9141, "pure3_delta_vs_e28p": 0.017, "stack_vs_ror_delta": 0.0124, "stack_confirm_delta": 0.0128, "boardkeep_wr_vs_stack": 0.2185, "item_rate_per_opportunity": [0.2261, 0.1944]} --parent e28p@1
